name: Cheese Dosa Recipe (Street Style)

steps.instruction: Finely chop onion and tomato. Grate cheese. Stir the batter well (add few tablespoons water if using thick idli batter).
Heat a well-seasoned tawa and grease with oil.
Pour a ladle of batter and spread gently on low heat.
When top starts cooking, sprinkle chopped onions, then tomatoes.
Add herbs, crushed black pepper and grated cheese all over.
Spread butter or oil on sides and top. Cook on low heat till base is golden and cheese melts.
Fold the dosa neatly and serve hot.

tips: Let refrigerated batter come to room temperature.
Use a well-seasoned tawa to prevent sticking.
Cook on low heat for best results.
variations: Add your choice of veggies like capsicum, carrots.
Use pizza sauce or schezwan sauce.
Make with only cheese and herbs.
Use processed or mozzarella cheese (avoid cheddar as it becomes greasy).
